name: Joomla With Mariadb
tagline: Joomla! is the mobile-ready and user-friendly way to build your website. Choose from thousands of features and designs. Joomla! is free and open source.
description:
Joomla! is the mobile-ready and user-friendly way to build your website. Choose from thousands of features and designs. Joomla! is free and open source.

Docs: https://joomla.org?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  joomla:
    image: joomla:latest
    volumes:
      - joomla_data:/var/www/html
    environment:
      - JOOMLA_DB_HOST=mariadb
      - JOOMLA_DB_USER=ufc003e2b4d
      - JOOMLA_DB_PASSWORD=4b12edee33e346fbeca74b0ba61c75e2
      - JOOMLA_DB_NAME=${MYSQL_DATABASE:-joomla-db}
    depends_on:
      mariadb:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42056:80
  mariadb:
    image: mariadb:11
    volumes:
      - joomla_mariadb_data:/var/lib/mysql
    environment:
      - MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=7d898a06b74f403aacabd3b81e2af28a
      - MYSQL_DATABASE=${MYSQL_DATABASE:-joomla-db}
      - MYSQL_USER=ufc003e2b4d
      - MYSQL_PASSWORD=4b12edee33e346fbeca74b0ba61c75e2
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - healthcheck.sh
        - --connect
        - --innodb_initialized
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  joomla_data: null
  joomla_mariadb_data: null
